mission.title: oauth2-proxy: Whitelist domains
mission.description: Adds a `whitelist-domain` flag that can be used to whitelist a set of domains for the redirect parameter in the authentication request

resolution.summary:
I wrote this on Friday to fix #399 

Tidied it up this morning and went to create PR noticing #461 had been created.

I think this better fixes #399 as it looks for domain suffixes rather than explicit domains which I think was the point of the discussion.

Take from this what you will
steps: Review the issue discussion for context
Apply the fix from the linked pull request
